title: System Bus Architecture for Multiple Device Handling
description: A diagram illustrating the shared system bus structure, arbitration logic, and data flow paths that allow a CPU to communicate with and manage multiple peripheral devices.
relationships: CPU sends requests and receives data via the shared System Bus
Bus Arbiter grants control of the bus to one device at a time to prevent conflicts
Device Controllers act as interfaces between the System Bus and their specific hardware
Devices can signal the CPU via the Interrupt Controller to request service
